pi_items.source: Checked setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts where PROJECT_DIR is defined and used.
Manually counted tests across test files created in setup_task.sh: test_graph.py (4), test_metrics.py (8), test_community.py (3), and test_io.py (4).
Checked verifier.py which explicitly adds these points to the total score upon the corresponding tests passing.
Checked verifier.py where 'passed' is computed as 'score >= 60'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires implementing stubbed network algorithms in a PyCharm project located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/citation_network. A total of 19 tests are verified to exist in the generated test files. The verifier assigns points for passing groups of tests: PageRank (20), Betweenness (20), Clustering (15), Community (15), I/O (20), and No Regression (10), matching the claimed scoring. A passing score requires 60 or more points. The provided sample dataset is a slice of the real SNAP Cit-HepTh citation network, not synthetic data.
